name: HR operations teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll runs/month tool
description: For HR operations teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll runs/month, discrepancies cause late payroll disbursements. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual checks and reconciliations.
target_audience: HR operations teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll runs/month
